ddls:
CREATE TABLE "memory_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory region */,
  "address_range" TEXT /* Address range of the memory region */,
  "memory_type" TEXT /* Type of memory (e.g., SRAM, Peripheral) */,
  "shareability" TEXT /* Shareability status of the memory region */,
  "cache_policy" TEXT /* Caching policy applied to the memory region */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the memory region */,
  "peripheral_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the peripheral that the memory region belongs to */,
  "peripheral_name" TEXT /* Name of the peripheral that the memory region belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the memory type (e.g., SRAM, Flash) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the memory type */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the memory type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cache_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caching policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the caching policy (e.g., Write Through, Write Back) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the caching policy */,
  "cache_line_size" INTEGER /* Size of the cache lines */,
  "cache_size" INTEGER /* Total size of the cache */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory configuration */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory region */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory type */,
  "shareability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to shareability setting */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to caching policy */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the memory configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the memory configuration */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application that uses this memory configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_configurations_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES cache_policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_configurations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES memory_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_configurations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES memory_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "app_category" TEXT /* Category of the application */,
  "system_requirements" TEXT /* System requirements for running the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Engineer, Architect) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last access to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the memory configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the memory configuration was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES memory_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory configuration */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES memory_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the memory region being analyzed */,
  "usage_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of usage (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytics record */,
  "pattern_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the usage pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES memory_regions ("region_id")
)
